title: SarasaUiSC For Caxton
description: Change the game font to SarasaUiSC using Caxton.
body:
# SarasaUiSC For Caxton
## Feature
Change your game font to [SarasaUiSC](https://github.com/be5invis/Sarasa-Gothic).

*You have to use this pack with [Caxton](https://modrinth.com/mod/caxton)!*

<details>
<summary>中文版</summary>

# SarasaUiSC For Caxton
## 功能
将游戏字体更改为 [SarasaUiSC](https://github.com/be5invis/Sarasa-Gothic)。

**依赖于 [Caxton](https://modrinth.com/mod/caxton) 模组！**

</details>
